abstract.text: This protocol can be implemented by any type that can be
used to perform keyboard-related callout actions.

inlineContent.text: KeyboardKit will automatically setup a standard protocol
when the keyboard is launched. You can change or replace
it at any time to customize the callout behavior.
KeyboardKit Pro can be used to unlock localized services

abstract.text: Keyboard-specific services.
Trigger feedback for callout selection change.
This namespace contains keyboard callout-related types.
This context has observable callout-related state and is
used for both input and action callouts.
Get callout actions for the provided keyboard action.
This class is inherited by all Pro services and also
serves as a namespace for Pro service types.
A list of KeyboardKit supported locales.
This protocol can be implemented by any type that can be
used to perform keyboard-related callout actions.
This is a base class for keyboard callout services.
This service class provides a standard way to handle
